projects.name: local repo
projects.notes: Add project-specific indexing rules here (globs, ignore, languages).

recent_tasks.title: Summarize selected function
recent_tasks.example_prompt: Explain what this function does and list potential edge cases.

snippets.content: PATCH: apply unified diff to specified file; return result

notes.security: Keep LOCAL_PROXY_BASE and tokens out of source control. Use DISABLE_SSL_VERIFY only for temporary corporate debugging.
notes.ux: Zed should only send bounded context (selected text + ±30 lines) to reduce token usage.
notes.development: MVP uses in-memory index; plan to switch to Chroma/hnswlib for production.

meta.usage_hint: This memory.json is a small seed of user preferences and project hints. The agent should consult preferences to shape prompt size, model choices, and retrieval behavior.
